intro.title: Choose Your MBTI Test Depth
intro.description: Pick the level of depth you want before starting the personality test.

accurate.title: Accurate (40 questions)
accurate.description: Deep dive for highly precise results.

test.title: MBTI Personality Test
test.completion: You answered all questions. Submit to see your MBTI result.

questions.q1: I gain energy from being around many people.
questions.q2: I trust facts more than gut impressions.
questions.q3: I prioritize logic over personal feelings when deciding.
questions.q4: I prefer clear plans over spontaneous changes.
questions.q5: I enjoy being the one who starts conversations.
questions.q6: I focus on practical details before possibilities.
questions.q7: I tend to be direct even if it sounds blunt.
questions.q8: I like to close tasks quickly rather than keep options open.
questions.q9: I think out loud to understand my ideas.
questions.q10: I usually notice concrete facts before hidden patterns.
questions.q11: I can detach emotions to make fair choices.
questions.q12: I feel more comfortable when my schedule is structured.
questions.q13: I feel energized after social gatherings.
questions.q14: I prefer proven methods over experimentation.
questions.q15: I value objective truth more than harmony.
questions.q16: I create to-do lists and follow them closely.
questions.q17: I speak before I fully process my thoughts.
questions.q18: I trust what is observable more than abstract theories.
questions.q19: I challenge ideas even when people may disagree.
questions.q20: I dislike last-minute changes in plans.
questions.q21: I naturally seek group activities over solo time.
questions.q22: I rely on past experience more than future vision.
questions.q23: I decide quickly based on rational analysis.
questions.q24: I prefer routines and clear expectations.
questions.q25: I openly express myself with new people.
questions.q27: I can separate feelings from decisions in tense moments.
questions.q28: I feel uneasy when plans stay undefined.
questions.q29: I recover faster by talking to others.
questions.q30: I trust realistic options over imaginative ideas.
questions.q31: I evaluate outcomes more than emotional impact.
questions.q32: I plan ahead for deadlines and milestones.
questions.q33: I feel comfortable taking social leadership.
questions.q34: I prefer concrete examples over metaphors.
questions.q35: I argue ideas to test their strength.
questions.q36: I like to complete one decision before starting another.
questions.q37: I am energized by networking and events.
questions.q38: I focus on what is currently real, not hypothetical.
questions.q39: I prioritize consistency and fairness over empathy.
questions.q40: I keep my environment organized and predictable.

traitsDescriptions.openness: Inventive and curious vs. consistent and cautious. Reflects intellectual curiosity, creativity, and a preference for novelty.
traitsDescriptions.conscientiousness: Efficient and organized vs. extravagant and careless. Reflects dependability, discipline, and goal-oriented behavior.
traitsDescriptions.extraversion: Outgoing and energetic vs. solitary and reserved. Reflects sociability, positive emotion, and assertiveness.
traitsDescriptions.agreeableness: Friendly and compassionate vs. critical and rational. Reflects cooperation, trust, and empathy.
traitsDescriptions.neuroticism: Sensitive and nervous vs. resilient and confident. Reflects emotional reactivity and stress sensitivity.

page.description: Uncover the depths of your psyche through linguistic analysis. Pour your thoughts into the void, and let our intelligence map your true nature across the Big Five personality dimensions.

page.title: Your Psyche Map
page.wordCountDescription: Based on your submission of {{count}} words.
page.noAnalysisFallback: No analysis loaded yet. Chat is available with balanced default scores.

summary.title: Psychological Insight
summary.fallback: Your words reveal someone carrying real depth beneath the surface — thoughtful, emotionally aware, and quietly searching for clarity. There is strength in how honestly you express yourself, even when the feeling is heavy.

chat.title: Persona Chat
chat.introNoMbti: I'm here to explain your profile and help with practical next steps. Ask me anything about your Big Five results.
chat.introWithMbti: I'm here to explain your profile and help with practical next steps. Your MBTI result is {{mbti}}, and I can connect that with your Big Five scores. Ask me anything.
chat.emptyResponseError: The assistant returned an empty response.
chat.unexpectedError: Unexpected error while sending chat message.

page.title: Analysis Records
page.fetchError: Failed to retrieve records. The void is silent.
page.invalidResponse: Unexpected response from the API. Make sure the backend is running on port 8081 (not 8080).
page.emptyDescription: You haven't submitted any thoughts to the void yet.

page.title: Speak to the Void
page.description: Write freely about your life, your dreams, your fears, or a recent experience. The more authentic you are, the deeper the analysis.
page.invalidApiResponse: Invalid API response. Restart the backend on port 8081 and reload the frontend.

page.description: The page you requested does not exist.
